title: Greek court upholds criminal organisation verdict on neo-Nazi Golden Dawn
summary_full: The party's founder Nikos Mihaloliakos and other officials are again found guilty, almost six years after an original trial.
summary_public: The party's founder Nikos Mihaloliakos and other officials are again found guilty, almost six years after an original trial.

GR.label: positive
